ddls:
CREATE TABLE "explainers" (
  "explainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the explainer */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Class name used in implementation */,
  "agnostic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the explainer is agnostic to the model */,
  "local" INTEGER /* Indicates if the explainer provides local interpretability */,
  "global" INTEGER /* Indicates if the explainer provides global interpretability */,
  "original_implementation" TEXT /* Source of the original implementation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the explainer method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing parameters specific to the explainer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the explainer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the explainer was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the explainer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the explainer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explainers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explainers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data (e.g., database, file) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_explainers" (
  "model_explainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-explainer relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated machine learning model */,
  "explainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the explainer used for the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing parameters used for the explainer with this model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model-explainer relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model-explainer relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_explainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_explainers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_explainers_explainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("explainer_id") REFERENCES explainers ("explainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_explainers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_explainers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "model_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-feature relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated machine learning model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated feature */,
  "importance_score" TEXT /* Numerical score indicating the importance of the feature for the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model-feature relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model-feature relationship was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explanation_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explanation request */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being used */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* JSON string containing input data for the prediction */,
  "explanation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the explanation generated for the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the explanation request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "requested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Date when the request was completed */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the request failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanation_requests_explanation_id FOREIGN KEY ("explanation_id") REFERENCES explanations ("explanation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanation_requests_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanation_requests_requested_by FOREIGN KEY ("requested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explanations" (
  "explanation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explanation */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated explanation request */,
  "explanation_detail" TEXT /* Detailed explanation text */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the explanation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the explanation was generated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the explanation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the explanation was last updated */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Numerical score indicating the confidence in the explanation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explanation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES explanation_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explanations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explainer_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "explainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the explainer being modified */,
  "modification_detail" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the modification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explainer_modifications_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explainer_modifications_explainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("explainer_id") REFERENCES explainers ("explainer_id")
)
